payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial lower cabinet door of painted beige wood with a recessed panel and a short curved metal pull mounted near the top under a countertop; left edge of the door is cropped by the image frame, surface shows light gloss reflections and minor scuffs; approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.
